title: Vanilla Reimagined
description: vanilla minecraft with a RPG feel :O
body:
Hey there, welcome to **Vanilla Reimagined**! It's an multiplayer-friendly Minecraft modpack that's all about enhancing the game with stuff that feels like it should've been there from the start. We've added a bunch of cool mods that seamlessly integrate into the vanilla Minecraft experience. You'll find new mobs, exciting terrain, and tons of other tweaks that make everything more fun. So gather your friends, jump in, and let's take your Minecraft adventures to the next level with **Vanilla Reimagined**!

- wen we mean by multiplayer-friendly we mean like u can use the essentials mod to host a world :D we havent tested multiplayer on a server yet so we dont know if it will work

credits to
[flowstate](https://www.youtube.com/@flowstatevideo)
for the inspiration otherwords I made this because of him
